title: koeleria besseri
intro: Koeleria besseri, also known as Bess's hair grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Koeleria besseri include reducing the severity of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Koeleria besseri include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
